stories.title: **Chicago Cubs 10-Game Win Streak — Beating the World Champion Dodgers**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Cubs are on a 10-game win streak. And they just beat the defending champions.

Chicago rallied from 4 runs down to beat the Dodgers 6-4 on Friday. Swanson clutch. Again.

Cubs 16-9. Tied for first in the NL Central. Game 3 vs LA is TONIGHT.

#Cubs #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
During the Cubs' 8-game stretch of their win streak:

• 58 runs scored
• 20 runs allowed
• 2.22 team ERA

A portion of this streak hadn't been seen in nearly 100 years.

Longest active win streak in the majors. Game 3 vs Dodgers tonight.

#Cubs #MLB

article.headline: Chicago Cubs Beat the Defending Champions for 10th Straight Win — The Best Streak in Baseball Right Now

stories.title: **Yordan Alvarez Dominates MLB — Leads in 8 Offensive Categories**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Yordan Alvarez is leading MLB in 8 offensive categories.

11 HRs. .347 BA. 26 RBIs. .466 OBP. 1.245 OPS. 33 hits.

His 11 HRs through 26 games ties the Astros franchise record (Berkman).

The Astros are 10-16. The irony is real.

#Astros #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Name a better hitter than Yordan Alvarez right now.

26 RBIs. 11 HRs. .347 BA. 1.245 OPS.

He leads MLB in every major offensive category. His team is 10-16.

This is not how it's supposed to work.

#Astros #MLB

article.headline: Yordan Alvarez Is Leading MLB in 8 Offensive Categories — and His Team Is 10-16

stories.title: **NL Central All 5 Teams Over .500 — First Time in Divisional Era History**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Every team in the NL Central is over .500.

Reds: 16-9
Cubs: 16-9
Cardinals: 14-10
Pirates: 14-11
Brewers: 13-11

First time in Divisional Era history. The best division in baseball right now isn't a debate.

#MLB #NLCentral

article.headline: All 5 NL Central Teams Are Over .500 — The First Time in Divisional Era History

stories.title: **Elly De La Cruz Steals Home / Reds Win 2-1 Over Rangers**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Elly De La Cruz stole home today vs the Rangers.

Second time in his career. Second time in 3 years.

5th Reds player since 1974 to do it twice. Reds win 2-1. De La Cruz is 23 years old.

#Reds #MLB

article.headline: Elly De La Cruz Steals Home for 2nd Career Time, Reds Win 2-1 Over Rangers

stories.title: **Aaron Judge Turns 34 — Yankees 16-9, 9 HRs, AL East Lead**

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge turns 34 today.

9 HRs in 22 games. Yankees 16-9, leading the AL East.

He needs 23 more to reach 400 career HRs. At this pace, he could get there before the All-Star break.

Happy birthday to the best slugger in baseball.

#Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Aaron Judge Turns 34 — 9 HRs, Yankees Lead AL East, and 400 Career HRs Are in Sight

stories.title: **Dodgers Bullpen Blows 4-Run Lead / Cubs Series Context**

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers led 4-0 behind Emmet Sheehan's season-best start on Friday.

The bullpen gave it all back. Cubs won 6-4. 10th straight win for Chicago.

Game 3 tonight. Dodgers are still MLB's best record — but the pen is a question.

#Dodgers #Cubs #MLB

stories.title: **Washington Nationals Snap Atlanta's Winning Streak, James Wood Powers 11-4 Win**

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
James Wood homered. Luis García Jr. went 4-for-4.

Washington beat Atlanta 11-4 to snap the Braves' 6-game win streak.

The Nationals' rebuild is producing real players.

#Nationals #Braves #MLB
